prompt: A candid, highly realistic smartphone photo inside a busy Sam’s Club warehouse store in China. Center the composition on a young East Asian man from mid-torso up, standing upright and facing the camera, with his face obscured by a rectangular blur block for privacy. He wears a plain black short-sleeve T-shirt with a small white Tesla logo on the left chest and holds a large clear plastic bag of red apples in his left hand, tied at the top with a blue band. The apple bag has a white label reading “envy” with small Chinese text beneath it. Behind him is a bright retail interior with tall industrial ceilings, warehouse shelving, shoppers, shopping carts, and stacked produce displays. Prominently show the blue diamond Sam’s Club wall sign at upper left with the text “Sam’s CLUB” and “山姆会员商店,” and a large blue wall banner behind him reading “更好的生活尽在山姆” and “Life is Better in the Club.” On the upper right, hang a tall white vertical banner that reads “优质优价” and “Great Products Great Prices,” with blue and green geometric accents. Include many background customers, slightly out of focus, to create an authentic crowded shopping atmosphere. Lighting should be bright, even retail overhead lighting; colors natural; perspective eye level; documentary snapshot aesthetic; sharp foreground subject with mildly softened background; portrait orientation.
